content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/prisma/schema.prisma:1	generator client {2	  provider = "prisma-client-js"3	}4	5	datasource db {6	  provider = "sqlite"7	  url      = "file:./dev.db"8	}9	10	model User {11	  id            String    @id @default(cuid())12	  name          String?13	  email         String?   @unique14	  password      String?15	  image         String?16	  role          String    @default("USER")17	  restaurants   Restaurant[]18	  orders        Order[]19	  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())20	  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt21	}22	23	model Restaurant {24	  id          String     @id @default(cuid())25	  name        String26	  description String?27	  address     String?28	  ownerId     String29	  owner       User       @relation(fields: [ownerId], references: [id])30	  menuItems   MenuItem[]31	  orders      Order[]32	  createdAt   DateTime   @default(now())33	  updatedAt   DateTime   @updatedAt34	}35	36	model MenuItem {37	  id           String      @id @default(cuid())38	  name         String39	  description  String?40	  price        Float41	  restaurantId String42	  restaurant   Restaurant  @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id])43	  orderItems   OrderItem[]44	  createdAt    DateTime    @default(now())45	  updatedAt    DateTime    @updatedAt46	}47	48	model Order {49	  id           String      @id @default(cuid())50	  userId       String51	  user         User        @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])52	  restaurantId String53	  restaurant   Restaurant  @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id])54	  items        OrderItem[]55	  total        Float56	  status       String      @default("PENDING")57	  createdAt    DateTime    @default(now())58	  updatedAt    DateTime    @updatedAt59	}60	61	model OrderItem {62	  id         String   @id @default(cuid())63	  orderId    String64	  order      Order    @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id])65	  menuItemId String66	  menuItem   MenuItem @relation(fields: [menuItemId], references: [id])67	  quantity   Int68	  price      Float69	}
